function.name: think
function.arguments:
{"thought": "I have successfully created the initial configuration files (package.json, tsconfig.json, next.config.js, prisma/schema.prisma).

According to the task requirements and my scratchpad, the next steps are to create the remaining files for the restaurant management application.

The remaining files to create are:
- src/app/layout.tsx
- src/app/page.tsx
- src/app/globals.css
- src/app/api/auth/[...nextauth]/route.ts
- src/lib/prisma.ts
- src/lib/auth.ts
- src/app/auth/login/page.tsx
- src/app/auth/register/page.tsx
- src/components/Navbar.tsx
- src/components/RestaurantCard.tsx
- src/components/MenuItemForm.tsx
- src/components/OrderTable.tsx
- src/app/api/restaurants/route.ts
- src/app/api/menu/route.ts
- src/app/api/orders/route.ts
- src/app/dashboard/page.tsx
- src/app/menu/page.tsx
- src/app/orders/page.tsx
- src/middleware.ts
- .env.example

I will proceed to create these files in batches. I will start with the core application structure and authentication files."}
